title: pvp template
description: a template for making a pvp texture pack
body:
**This is a template for making a pvp texture pack.**

### It includes:
- A folder with help making a texture pack
- A folder with things like clear water, no totem pop and much more, so you can quickly add a feature to your texture pack.
- All the textures for pvp.

### [My other projects](https://modrinth.com/user/Scroutop)
